name: Augustine of Hippo
title: Theologian & Author
bio: Early Christian theologian and philosopher from North Africa. Bishop of Hippo Regius and author of 'Confessions' and 'The City of God,' among the most influential works in Western Christianity.
faith: After years of dissolute living and exploring various philosophies, Augustine dramatically converted to Christianity, famously hearing a child's voice saying 'Take up and read.' His 'Confessions' is one of the first autobiographies in Western literature and a testament to God's grace.

sources.title: Augustine of Hippo — Wikipedia
sources.note: Comprehensive article on the most influential Church Father

sources.title: Confessions
sources.note: By Augustine. His autobiographical account of conversion, one of the most important works in Christian literature

sources.title: The City of God
sources.note: By Augustine. His monumental work on Christian philosophy of history

tagline: Heard 'Take up and read' and transformed Western Christianity
